indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to clear floor space for yoga practice.

indicators.name: rug
indicators.rationale: The rug partially obstructs the floor space and could cause slipping during yoga.

indicators.name: cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets on either side of the bed create a cluttered and obstructed space.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light, which is beneficial for yoga.

indicators.name: ceiling
indicators.rationale: High ceiling can accommodate taller individuals comfortably.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of a bed and cabinets, which obstruct the floor space. However, the hardwood flooring and large windows contribute positively to the environment.
